message:
feat(storage): Add migration roundtrip tests and improve formatting

Enhances storage module with comprehensive migration testing to verify
schema upgrade/downgrade paths work correctly. Includes code formatting
improvements for better readability.

- Add migration_plan_empty_when_at_target test
- Add migration_roundtrip_down_then_up test validating reversibility
- Improve code formatting in upsert_account and related functions
- Refine error handling formatting in update_account_last_used_sync

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
